channel.title: dinner-inspiration Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh dinner-inspiration posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: No-Bake Cheesecake Parfaits with Spring Berries
item.description: A straightforward recipe for no-bake cheesecake parfaits featuring a light, fluffy cream cheese filling folded with whipped cream, layered with fresh spring berries. Learn why folding whipped cream gently is key to texture, how to balance sweetness, and tips for assembling parfaits that hold their shape without refrigeration for hours.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 15 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

media:content.media:title: No-Bake Cheesecake Parfaits with Spring Berries
media:content.media:description: A straightforward recipe for no-bake cheesecake parfaits featuring a light, fluffy cream cheese filling folded with whipped cream, layered with fresh spring berries. Learn why folding whipped cream gently is key to texture, how to balance sweetness, and tips for assembling parfaits that hold their shape without refrigeration for hours.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230383494, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious

item.title: 30 Quick Lunch Ideas for Busy Days
item.description: A curated collection of 30 quick lunch recipes that are simple to prepare and flavorful. Each idea is designed to fit into busy schedules without sacrificing taste or nutrition. These include fresh salads, hearty sandwiches, and easy bowls, all ready in about 15 minutes.
item.dc:creator: author_001

item.title: Quick Chicken Stir Fry with Soy-Ginger Sauce
item.description: A fast and flavorful chicken stir fry perfect for busy weeknights. This recipe features a simple soy-ginger marinade that tenderizes the chicken while keeping the vegetables crisp and vibrant. Learn how timing and high heat combine to create ideal textures and balanced flavors in under 30 minutes.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 25 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 500g (1.1 lb) boneless, skinless chicken breasts, thinly sliced
  • 2 tbsp (30ml) soy sauce
  • 1 tbsp (15ml) rice vinegar
  • 1 tbsp (15ml) grated fresh ginger
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tsp (5ml) sesame oil
  • 1 tbsp (15ml) vegetable oil, divided
  • 1 red bell pepper, thinly sliced
  • 1 medium carrot, julienned
  • 100g (3.5 oz) snap peas, trimmed
  • 3 green onions, sliced
  • Optional: 1 tsp (5ml) honey or brown sugar (to balance acidity)
  • Salt and black pepper, to taste
  • Cooked jasmine or basmati rice, for serving

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230383494 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #sauce #vinegar

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Quick Chicken Stir Fry with Soy-Ginger Sauce
media:content.media:description: A fast and flavorful chicken stir fry perfect for busy weeknights. This recipe features a simple soy-ginger marinade that tenderizes the chicken while keeping the vegetables crisp and vibrant. Learn how timing and high heat combine to create ideal textures and balanced flavors in under 30 minutes.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230383494, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, boneless, sauce, vinegar
